mnemonics.title: Thread Index Formula: BIG + TINY
mnemonics.content: Global index = Block Index * Group size + Thread Index within block. Think 'BIG picture (blockIdx * blockDim) plus TINY detail (threadIdx)'.

mnemonics.title: Warp Size: 32 Always
mnemonics.content: A warp always has 32 threads on NVIDIA GPUs. Remember: 'Warp = Width of 32'. Always make block sizes multiples of 32 to avoid wasted threads.
